{{Quote|Artificial gravity restored. Hull breaches forward, decks one and three. The ''Mrisst'' is dead in space; ''Sullust'' and ''Mantooine'' are badly damaged. ''Peacemaker'' is also dead in space.|Damage assessment during the Battle of Ciutric|<ref name="Isard" />}}
The '''''Mantooine''''', named for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the same [[Mantooine/Legends|name]], was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] serving the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]]. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], it took part in the [[Battle of Ciutric]], fought around the planet [[Ciutric IV]], against the forces of former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]]. Working in cohesion with other [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]], it struck against the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Emperor's Wisdom]]'', eventually sustaining significant damage in the [[Space warfare/Legends|battle]], which was won by the New Republic through the use of the [[Thrawn Pincer]] tactic of utilizing the enemy's [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity wells]] to bring a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of reinforcements out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Description==
The ''Mantooine'' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that served with the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|forces]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the later [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CSWE" /> It was one of a number of [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] named for Republic [[Planet/Legends|planets]], for instance [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]],<ref name="Isard" /> a world located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] with a long history of resisting the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook">''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''</ref> The ''Mantooine'' was equipped with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and armed with double [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Cannon/Legends|cannons]].<ref name="Isard" />

==History==
In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].</ref> the ''Mantooine'' was part of a New Republic [[Task force/Legends|task force]] led by [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] against the forces of former Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]] of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] at the [[Battle of Ciutric]], fought around [[Ciutric IV]], a planet<ref name="Isard" /> in the [[Ciutric system/Legends|Ciutric system]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Ciutric system/Legends|Ciutric system]]</ref> The task force was spearheaded by the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] and the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Emancipator]]'', with support provided by three [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]] and six CR90 corvettes, including the ''Mantooine''. Having received intelligence on expected Hegemony forces, this task force was thought to have been sufficient to successfully complete the mission; however, on arrival [[Star system/Legends|in-system]], Krennel's forces were found to have two additional [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]], giving them a numerical advantage.<ref name="Isard" />

Together with the corvettes [[Dantooine (CR90 corvette)|''Dantooine'']] and [[Ryloth (CR90 corvette)|''Ryloth'']], the ''Mantooine'' engaged the ''Victory''-class Star Destroyer ''[[Emperor's Wisdom]]'', flying over the top of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and attacking its dorsal [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] with double turbolaser cannon fire. The combined salvos overloaded the shields, enabling a number of supporting Republic [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]] to score direct hits on the [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]], although not enough to cause significant damage. As the battle continued, the ''Mantooine'' sustained heavy damage, along with its sister corvette, the [[Sullust (CR90 corvette)|''Sullust'']]. At this point of the battle, with the Hegemony activating their [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]] [[Gravity well projector/Legends|projectors]], Ackbar launched a [[Thrawn Pincer]], a tactic devised by the Imperial [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]: using the enemy's gravity well, he brought his own reinforcements in behind the Hegemony forces, to strike at their vulnerable rear. Led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], the two ''Victory''-class Star Destroyers, ''[[Corusca Fire]]'' and ''[[Selonian Fire]]'', jumped into the system and attacked Krennel's forces, targeting the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the ''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer [[Reckoning (Imperial II-class)|''Reckoning'']]. The assault [[Death/Legends|killed]] Prince-Admiral Krennel, and effectively ended the Hegemony resistance.<ref name="Isard" /> The ''Mantooine'' managed to survive the encounter, but only barely.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Mantooine'' first appeared in ''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'', the eighth novel in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'' novel series]]. It was written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] and published in [[1999]].<ref name="Isard" />
